message:
bd-2q3f.3: fix CGA routing to detect segments inside obstacles

The CGA intersect_segment() only finds boundary crossings, missing
segments entirely inside an obstacle. Fixed by also checking if
segment start point is inside the expanded obstacle.

- Add expanded.contains(&start_cga) check to all routing functions
- Add 3 edge case tests for segments entirely inside obstacles
- Remove unused to_cga_rect helper function

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
